SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF J & L AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ZUTANG XIAO, OWNER AND ASSISTED WITH CANTONESE INTERPRETATION BY JULIE XIAO, DAUGHTER. MS. XIAO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. DEFENDANT CHARLES CHATFIELD TAYLOR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,890.00 FILED BY J&L AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, CHARLES CHATFIELD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
